title: Ontechii
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ontechii''' was a genre of music popular during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Some [[Kitonak/Legends|Kitonaks]], taken from their homeworld of [[Kirdo III/Legends|Kirdo III]] as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], met with success as ontechii musicians after gaining their freedom.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-XX-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''
